provider: Government of India (Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare)
max_loan_amount: Need-based; collateral-free up to Rs 2 lakh
interest_rate: 7% p.a. (effective ~4% with subvention)
subsidy_details: 2% p.a. off interest + 3% prompt repayment incentive

eligibility.land_requirement: Based on cultivable landholding

provider: Government of India (Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare)
max_loan_amount: Rs 6000 per year
interest_rate: NA
subsidy_details: Rs 2000 every 4 months via DBT

eligibility.land_requirement: Up to 2 hectares cultivable land

provider: Government of India (Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare)
max_loan_amount: Based on sum insured
interest_rate: NA
subsidy_details: Farmer pays 2% Kharif, 1.5% Rabi; govt covers rest

eligibility.land_requirement: Cultivable land under notified crops

provider: Government of India (Ministry of Finance)
max_loan_amount: Rs 10 lakh (Shishu up to Rs 50k, Kishore up to Rs 5L, Tarun up to Rs 10L)
subsidy_details: 2% interest subvention on Shishu loans for first 12 months

eligibility.land_requirement: Not applicable

provider: Government of India (Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare)
max_loan_amount: Up to Rs 2 crore with CGTMSE guarantee
interest_rate: Market-linked with 3% p.a. interest subsidy
subsidy_details: Interest subvention up to 3% p.a. for 5-7 years

eligibility.land_requirement: Land ownership and viable infrastructure project required

provider: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India
max_loan_amount: Up to Rs 3 lakh for crop loans via KCC
interest_rate: 7% p.a. (effective 4% with prompt repayment)
subsidy_details: 1.5% subvention to banks + 3% prompt repayment incentive to farmers

eligibility.land_requirement: Must be eligible for KCC-linked institutional crop credit

benefits: supports animal husbandry and fisheries KCC

scheme_name: NABARD Short-Term Refinance for Seasonal Agricultural Operations
provider: NABARD via cooperative banks, RRBs and commercial banks
max_loan_amount: As per eligible crop loan portfolio of bank
interest_rate: ~4.5% refinance rate to banks
subsidy_details: Concessional refinance reduces cost of funds for banks enabling 7% lending

eligibility.land_requirement: Farmers must satisfy lending bank crop loan eligibility

benefits: large-scale crop credit at concessional interest

scheme_name: Fisheries and Aquaculture Infrastructure Development Fund (FIDF)
provider: Department of Fisheries, Government of India with NFDB, NABARD, NCDC
max_loan_amount: Up to 80% of project cost
interest_rate: Min 5% p.a. with up to 3% interest subvention
subsidy_details: Interest subvention up to 3% p.a. on eligible fisheries infrastructure loans

eligibility.land_requirement: Suitable water bodies or coastal access required

benefits: supports employment in fisheries value chain
repayment_tenure: Up to 12 years including 2 year moratorium

provider: Department of Animal Husbandry & Dairying with NABARD and participating banks
max_loan_amount: Unit-specific; up to Rs 24 lakh for transport and cold chain
interest_rate: As per bank dairy term loan rates
subsidy_details: Back-ended capital subsidy 25% (33.33% for SC/ST) with monetary ceilings

eligibility.land_requirement: Ownership or lease of land for cattle sheds required

benefits: supports milking machines and cold chain
leverages bank credit with NABARD support
special_features: focus on value addition and cold chain

provider: State Bank of India
max_loan_amount: Need-based; up to Rs 3 lakh for interest subvention eligibility
interest_rate: Aligned with SBI agricultural lending rates; effective ~4% with subvention
subsidy_details: Eligible KCC crop loans up to Rs 3 lakh receive MISS interest subvention

eligibility.land_requirement: Owner cultivators, tenant farmers, oral lessees, SHGs, JLGs

benefits: no collateral up to Rs 1-2 lakh

provider: State Bank of India
max_loan_amount: Covers major portion of tractor or machinery cost
interest_rate: SBI agricultural term loan rates; lower than most NBFCs
subsidy_details: Not generally applicable; may qualify under mechanization schemes

eligibility.land_requirement: Minimum cultivable land holding as per product norms

benefits: enables purchase of tractors and harvesters
lower interest than NBFC tractor loans

provider: State Bank of India
max_loan_amount: Depends on herd size and project cost
interest_rate: SBI dairy/agriculture term loan rates; may qualify for NABARD subsidy
subsidy_details: If aligned with DEDS, borrower may receive back-ended capital subsidy

eligibility.land_requirement: Access to land for fodder or cattle sheds improves eligibility

benefits: formal term credit for dairy units

scheme_name: HDFC Bank Kisan Credit Card / Agri & Allied Loans
provider: HDFC Bank
max_loan_amount: Based on land, cropping pattern and scale of finance
interest_rate: Within HDFC agricultural lending slabs; competitive rates
subsidy_details: KCC-type crop loans may be eligible for central interest subvention

eligibility.land_requirement: Individual or joint borrowers owning agricultural land

benefits: single relationship for crop and investment credit
option to finance irrigation and implements
special_features: combined cash credit and term loan

provider: ICICI Bank
max_loan_amount: Based on landholding, cropping pattern and scale of finance
interest_rate: 8.25% to 13.6% depending on risk and product variant
subsidy_details: Crop loans may be eligible for central interest subvention under government schemes

eligibility.land_requirement: Must own agricultural land; age 18-70 years

benefits: KCC limit valid 5 years with one-time documentation

provider: Mahindra & Mahindra Financial Services Ltd.
max_loan_amount: Customised to tractor cost
interest_rate: 6-26% p.a. depending on profile
subsidy_details: None; may combine with state mechanization subsidies

eligibility.land_requirement: No land mortgage required; income and guarantors considered

benefits: quick processing and local field presence
no land mortgage in many cases

scheme_name: Karnataka Interest Subsidy for Agricultural Crop Loans (0% up to Rs 3 lakh)
provider: Government of Karnataka via cooperative credit structure
max_loan_amount: Short-term crop loans up to Rs 3 lakh; allied up to Rs 2 lakh
interest_rate: Effectively 0% for timely repayers via state subsidy
subsidy_details: State provides interest subsidy so crop loans up to Rs 3 lakh are at 0% interest

eligibility.land_requirement: Must borrow from PACS or cooperative banks in Karnataka

benefits: zero-interest crop loans up to Rs 3 lakh
similar concession for animal husbandry up to Rs 2 lakh

provider: Government of Karnataka
max_loan_amount: Based on value of mortgaged ornaments
subsidy_details: State subsidizes interest for soft crop loans against pledged ornaments

eligibility.land_requirement: Must hold valid farmer card and be active in Karnataka agriculture

benefits: leverages household jewellery for formal credit

scheme_name: Maharashtra Interest Subvention Scheme for Crop Loans
provider: Government of Maharashtra
max_loan_amount: Crop loans up to Rs 3 lakh
interest_rate: Effective 0-1% for timely repayers combining state and central subvention
subsidy_details: State gives 1% subvention to banks; combined with central 3% gives up to 6% total concession

eligibility.land_requirement: Farmers in Maharashtra with crop loans from nationalized, RRB and cooperative banks

benefits: significantly reduces effective interest for Maharashtra farmers
supports commercial and cooperative banking channels
repayment_tenure: Aligned to Kharif and Rabi seasons
special_features: alignment with central crop loan policy
focus on small and marginal farmers

provider: Various banks (SBI, HDFC, Axis etc.)
max_loan_amount: Based on gold value; up to Rs 40 lakh
subsidy_details: None

eligibility.land_requirement: None

scheme_name: National Animal Husbandry Infrastructure Development Fund (AHIDF)
provider: Department of Animal Husbandry & Dairying with banks, NABARD, NCDC, NDDB, SIDBI
max_loan_amount: Up to 90% of project cost
interest_rate: Concessional via interest subvention and guarantee support
subsidy_details: Interest subvention and credit guarantee support for eligible animal husbandry infrastructure
